title: How I Build a 30-Day Cloud Interview Plan
description: A practical week-by-week schedule for DevOps and Cloud Engineering interviews.
content: I split preparation into four tracks: fundamentals, hands-on labs, system design, and mock interviews. Each week has one main objective and measurable outcome.

title: Terraform Revision Notes That Actually Stick
description: A lightweight framework for revising Terraform modules, state handling, and troubleshooting.
content: Instead of re-reading full documentation, I focus on high-frequency interview areas: module composition, remote state, drift, and dependencies.
